name: poly_A_100000bp
description: Pure poly-A homopolymer of 100000 bp (GC=0%, single base run). Stresses mapper's k-mer indexing: every k-mer is identical, Shannon entropy collapses to ~0, lambda must scale dramatically to avoid catastrophic ambiguity. Models telomere-like and low-complexity tracts.
sources: synthetic, designed as mapper stress test — no biological source
